title: Add lightweight retrieval orchestration
objective: Implement deterministic rank fusion, context packing and budget enforcement without requiring local LLM calls in hot path.
requirements: Apply authority, freshness, accepted-belief and scope boosts.
Limit final context size and per-source diversity.
Keep optional LLM rerank disabled by default and guarded by budget/route flags.
acceptance_checks: Retrieval returns stable ordering for deterministic fixtures.
Accepted belief outranks raw chunk with weaker authority.
Expired or contested items are penalized or excluded according to policy.
Context packing respects item and token budgets.
No LLM call is needed for default search tests.
